---
name: PQC review request
about: Request review of AFT quantum-resistant cryptography or crypto-agility design
title: "[PQC Review]: "
labels: "pqc, security, cryptography"
assignees: ""
---

## Affected Crypto Profile

For example `aft-sig-ml-dsa`, `aft-sig-slh-dsa`, `aft-kem-ml-kem`, or a hybrid profile.

## Algorithm Or Key Type

Identify ML-KEM, ML-DSA, SLH-DSA, Ed25519, ECDSA P-256, RSA, symmetric encryption, hash, Merkle profile, or key-management concern.

## Signature / Key-Establishment Usage

Describe how the algorithm is used.

## Current Requirement

Quote or summarize the current AFT requirement.

## Concern Or Proposed Change

Describe the concern or proposed update.

## Migration Impact

Explain impact on existing keys, signatures, events, anchors, credentials, or verification methods.

## Backwards Compatibility

Describe legacy or hybrid compatibility implications.

## Security Analysis

Describe known risks, threat assumptions, and review questions.

## References

Link to standards, papers, implementation guidance, or review material.

## Reviewer Notes

Add notes for cryptography reviewers.
